expectations.text: Output includes standard .kql comment header block with Service: App Insights
expectations.evidence: File opens with '// ===...===' block containing Title, Service: App Insights, Tables: dependencies, requests, Description, Parameters (spikeStart, spikeEnd, baselineDuration, appName), Complexity: Intermediate

expectations.text: Uses the dependencies table as primary data source
expectations.evidence: Both spikeDeps and baselineDeps are built from 'dependencies' table directly. First line of each subquery: 'let spikeDeps = dependencies | ...' and 'let baselineDeps = dependencies | ...'
'let spikeStart = datetime(2026-04-01T02:45:00Z);' and 'let spikeEnd = datetime(2026-04-01T03:30:00Z);' — window centered on the 3am spike with 15 min pre-buffer and 30 min post
'| where cloud_RoleName has appName' where 'let appName = "orders-api";'

expectations.text: Groups results by dependency type (SQL, HTTP, etc.) and/or target
expectations.evidence: Summarizes 'by DependencyName = name, DependencyType = type, Target = target' — groups by all three: name, type, and target

expectations.text: Shows duration metrics (avg, p95, or max) to quantify degradation
expectations.evidence: SpikeAvgMs = round(avg(duration), 0), SpikeP95Ms = round(percentile(duration, 95), 0), SpikeMaxMs = round(max(duration), 0)

expectations.text: Uses timestamp column (not TimeGenerated) for App Insights tables
expectations.evidence: '| where timestamp between (spikeStart .. spikeEnd)' — uses lowercase 'timestamp', correct for App Insights dependencies table

claims.claim: Includes baseline comparison window (before spike) and computes deltas
claims.evidence: baselineDeps subquery covers datetime(2026-04-01T01:45:00Z) to datetime(2026-04-01T02:45:00Z). Delta columns: AvgMsDelta, P95MsDelta, FailRateDelta computed in the join step.

claims.claim: Flags dependencies that were new during the spike (no baseline calls)
claims.evidence: 'NewDuringSike = iif(isempty(BaseCallCount), true, false)' — typo in column name ('Sike' vs 'Spike') but logic is correct

eval_feedback.overall: All 7 assertions pass with strong evidence. The baseline-comparison delta approach goes beyond the minimum requirements. No suggestions.
